content.full_text:
September 12, 2000

Douglas Williams, Fire Chief
Rincon Valley Fire Protection District
91 Middle Rincon Road
Santa Rosa, CA 95409-3406

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-00-208

Dear Chief Williams:

This letter is to confirm that your request for advice, received via facsimile by the Fair Political Practices Commission on September 6, 2000, has been withdrawn. If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Deborah Allison
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
